char_overview: Former 狩灵协会3科 smith, walked after his daughter died in the first 扭曲 incident. Now forges in 锈钟.
char_looks: Black hair buzzed close to scalp, gray at temples. Gaunt features, dark gray eyes sunken deep. Old quench burn scars tracing both forearms. Charcoal-gray workshirt rolled to elbows, dark trousers, steel-toed boots. None.
char_flaws: Has not spoken his daughter's name in three years. Refuses to forge for anyone he does not respect.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-转印: Transfers pre-made 灵力回路 patterns into the quenching medium, then uses the quenching process to transfer them directly into the weapon, bypassing the laborious engraving process entirely.
char_mission: Forge only for those he deems worthy. An unfinished blade hangs above the furnace, forged for his daughter, untouched in three years.

char_relationships.写乐: Found him at his lowest, drinking alone in a 锈钟 bar after he left the 狩灵协会. Recognized him by the quench burns before he even said his name. Provides custom transcriptions far beyond standard templates, and brought 月 to him so he would pick up the hammer again.
char_relationships.月: 写乐 brought him to the forge, newly promoted to 分针 of 指针. 锻 watched him handle a blade and saw the steadiness his daughter once carried. Told 写乐 to transcribe 月's 灵力回路 that day. Has never told 月 why he agreed.
char_relationships.炭山 绫: Daughter. 狩灵协会2科 狩灵, died in the first 扭曲 incident at twenty. Her unfinished blade hangs above the furnace. He has not spoken her name since the funeral.
char_relationships.狩灵协会: Fifteen years and one daughter, repaid with a form letter and a locked filing cabinet. Does not speak the name aloud, lets the silence answer.
